## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences: what this PR adds or changes, and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New content (article / blog / log / paper digest / note / snippet / project)
- [ ] Content edit or correction
- [ ] Interactive component or site feature
- [ ] Data record (`data/*`)
- [ ] Crew / tooling (skills, agents, hooks, scripts)

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the notable changes. For content, list the slugs added or edited. -->

-

## Content checklist

<!-- Delete this whole section for non-content PRs. -->

- [ ] Frontmatter valid; slug is kebab-case; **date is correct**
- [ ] Article pairs original interactive components **and** real figures from the source
- [ ] Figures served locally under `public/…` (no hotlinking), with real alt text + attribution
- [ ] Dual-native: prose / static content carries every idea an interactive conveys
- [ ] Voice checked against `brand-crew/brand/voice.md` (no hype, no banned phrases)

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm validate` passes (typecheck + content + MDX compile)
- [ ] Diagrams verified rendering in light **and** dark — no overflow, no console errors

## Notes

<!-- Caveats, follow-ups, screenshots, or context for reviewers. -->
